qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the following C program: #include <stdio.h> int r() { static int num=7; return num--; } int main() { for (r();r();r()) printf("%d",r()); return 0; }

qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the following C program: #include <stdio.h> int main() { float sum = 0.0, j=1.0, i=2.0; while (i/j > 0.0625) { j=j+j; sum=sum+i/j; printf("%f\n", sum); } return 0; }

qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the following C program: #include <stdio.h> int main() { int a[] = {2, 4, 6, 8, 10}; int i, sum=0, *b=a+4; for (i=0; i<5; i++) sum=sum+(*b-i)-*(b-i); printf("%d\n", sum); return 0; }
